content: Setting the Standard for Automation  The International Society of Automation  ISA  is a non-profit professional association of engineers, technicians and management engaged in industrial automation. As the globally trusted provider of foundational standards-based technical resources for the profession, ISA strives to build a better world through automation. Join Us Hi, I am MimoSM, the ISA Mascot! I am an AI-powered large-language model educated on ISA content  standards, training, reports, articles and presentations. Ask me all of your questions about industrial automation! Chat with Mimo Now Read the Latest from ISA ISA Elevates Eight Members to Fellow ISA congratulates the eight individuals elevated to the distinguished grade of ISA Fellow in 2026. View the News Release New Standard for SCADA Systems Announced ISA's newly published ISA-112 Part 1 standard provides a framework for modernizing SCADA systems and making them easier to design, build, operate and maintain.View the News Release Automation.com's Top 10 Articles for 2025 Automation.com, ISA's publishing arm, takes a look back at the most popular technical features and news articles of 2025.View on Automation.com Read the Latest Automation.com Monthly The February issue of Automation.com Monthly covers IIoT and digital transformation topics.View on Automation.com Upcoming Events 2026 ISA OT Cybersecurity Summit 17-19 June 2026   Prague, Czech Republic Insights and understanding of how to use standards and conformance systems to keep operational technology  OT  safe and secure. Register 2026 ISA Automation Summit   Expo USA 27-29 September 2026   Walt Disney World Swan and Dolphin, Lake Buena Vista, Florida Immerse yourself in a world of endless possibilities and explore how automation is reshaping the future across various industries. Register View all ISA s mission is to advance technical competence by connecting the automation community to achieve operational excellence. I am Interested in Membership ISA Standards Training ISA Certification and Certificate Programs ISA Publications Events and Conferences Technical Content Topics Go Explore ISA Membership Renewal Due Level up your 2026 experience keep your exclusive member benefits. Invoices now available, renew today!Renew Today Become a Member Fuel your professional growth in 2026 with ISA membership. ISA offers professional and student membership with benefits.Join Now Grow Your Automation Prospects with ISA Invest in your career with ISA self-paced modular training. Start learning for free today!Get Started Find ISA Standards Since 1949, ISA has helped automation professionals streamline processes and improve safety, efficiency and profitability. Find Standards Featured Products Execute Projects with Confidence Get real-world, practical lessons with ISA's Automation Project Management Specialist certificate. ISA IEC 62443 Series of Standards The world s only consensus-based automation and control systems cybersecurity standards. Custom Training Solutions Flexible onsite and online training solutions for an adaptable, skilled workforce. ISA Business Academy A 10-week virtual Mini-MBA certification course focused on teaching the fundamentals of organizational management and business finance. Important Information About Purchasing ISA Books ISA has transitioned our book sales and distribution to our publishing partner, Wiley. Visit the ISA storefront on the Wiley website to browse the full selection. To make a purchase, simply create an account with Wiley, add your selected book s  to the cart and proceed to checkout. If you need assistance, contact Wiley customer support. ISA is proud to be awarded a 2025 top-rated badge from Great Nonprofits! Read the announcement. metadata.description: Empowering the global automation community through standards and knowledge sharing.
